questions.text: How many endpoints does a line segment have?
questions.explanation: A line segment has two endpoints. It is a part of a line with a definite length.

questions.text: A ray has one endpoint and extends infinitely in one direction.
questions.explanation: A ray has one endpoint (starting point) and extends infinitely in one direction. It is denoted by an arrow symbol.

questions.correctAnswer: A closed figure made up of line segments.
questions.explanation: A polygon is a simple closed curve made up of straight line segments. Examples: triangle, quadrilateral, pentagon.

questions.text: A polygon with 5 sides is called a ________.
questions.explanation: A pentagon is a polygon with 5 sides and 5 angles. 'Penta' means five in Greek.
